title: Universal Heavy Duty Garage Storage Hooks Set, 30kg Load Capacity per Hook (6 Pack)
features: MULTIPURPOSE - For storage of lawn mowers, bikes, ladders, hose tools and other varied outdoor items.
HEAVY-DUTY - Each hook can hold up to 30kg, making it ideal to hang extreme heavy objects when properly installed.
ANTI-CORROSIVE - The hooks are powdered coated for rust resistance.
CONTENTS - Consists of 6 hooks (2x small, 2x medium, 2x large) for storing a wide variety of items in the garage, shed, basement or warehouse.

EASY TO INSTALL - Determine your desired location and drill a hole for wall plugs. Brush and blow out hole. Insert appropriate wall plugs. Hold item in line with drilled holes and fix to surface using appropriate screws (screws & plugs are not included)
description: An assorted size set of 6 multipurpose storage hooks in black. Prefect for organising those often neglected areas of the home such as sheds, garages and workshops. A coloured safety cap is supplied at the end of each hook. Can also be used in pairs to store longer items, such as ladders. The hooks come in 3 sizes; 2 x small 7cm wide hooks – holding 30kg each, 2 x medium 11cm wide hooks - holding 30kg each and 2 x 17cm wide hooks - holding 30kg each. The stainless steel hooks are durable and should be used with maximum weight loads mentioned. Depending on the surface, ensure to use appropriate fixing screws and plugs.
